title: orchis angustifolia subsp. cruenta
intro: Orchis angustifolia subsp. cruenta, also known as the narrow-leaved orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Orchis angustifolia subsp. cruenta include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
